Event:
Event Date:
Sage Bot Item Code: E9
Engraving 'Despicable Blow'

Enhancement: 1
Once in a while, silences the armor and weapons of a random enemy for 4 sec. During this time, the enemy can't use their armor and weapon abilities.

Enhancement: 2
11000 Magic armor from the gems
Once in a while, silences the armor, weapon, amulet, and ring of 2 random enemies for 4 sec. During this time, enemies can't use their armor, weapon, amulet, and ring abilities.

Enhancement: 3
22000 Magic armor from the gems
Once in a while, silences the armor, weapon, amulet, ring, totem, and artifact of 3 random enemies for 4 sec. During this time, enemies can't use their armor, weapon, amulet, ring, totem, and artifact abilities.
